STAY_2_IND_SW 
LABEL: 
Two Midnight Stay Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: MEDPAR 2 Day Midnight Stay Indicator Switch 
SHORT NAME: STAY_2_IND_SW 
LONG NAME: STAY_2_IND_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes, the beneficiary received outpatient services within the hospital, prior to admission 
N = No outpatient services immediately prior to admission
